WAITING_FOR_ANSWER.instruction: Send a very short, friendly follow-up asking if they had any thoughts or questions about your last message. Keep it conversational and natural, like a quick check-in text.

FOLLOWUP_1.instruction: Send a casual bump asking if they are still interested in continuing the conversation. Mention that if they aren't, they can just let you know or reply 'stop'. Keep it polite and no-pressure.
